name: mascot-hippo
prompt: A cheerful cartoon hippo hero wearing a white-and-blue astronaut/robot suit, giving a thumbs up, holding a small gadget. Bright blue and white palette.

name: mascot-sloth
prompt: A cute relaxed sloth character hugging a tree branch, soft brown fur, friendly smile, pastel sky behind it.

name: mascot-rabbit
prompt: A brave cartoon rabbit hero in a blue-and-white mecha/robot suit, confident pose, big friendly eyes.

name: mascot-tiger
prompt: A playful cartoon tiger cub hero in a red-and-white sporty suit, energetic pose.

name: hero-splash
prompt: A hero group splash illustration: a friendly hippo astronaut mascot front and center with two small companion creatures, celebratory, bright blue sky background with soft clouds.

name: scene-island
prompt: A small floating green grassy island with a winding dirt path, a few trees, flowers and rocks, bright blue sky, isometric soft 3D game-map style.

name: badge-trophy
prompt: A glossy golden trophy badge inside a soft circular glow, celebratory, for a level-complete screen.

name: illustration-celebrate
